questions.question: Compare the volume of goods sold to different countries by the first and second ranked salespeople.

answer.value: The first-place salesperson outperformed the second-place salesperson in shipments to every country except New Zealand and the USA.

key_insights: The highest-ranked salesperson shipped the least to New Zealand; the runner-up shipped the least to India.

reasoning.reasoning: Apply the 'highlight top n' tool to emphasize the top two bars, facilitating a clearer comparison.
